Therapeutic Methods

Our Techniques

Transformative methods for working with holotropic states of consciousness

Core Therapeutic Modalities

Experiential techniques combining breathwork, bodywork, and integrative psychology

Holotropic Breathwork

Stan Grof's methodology using accelerated breathing, evocative music, and focused bodywork to access non-ordinary states.

  • • Breather and sitter roles
  • • Integration mandala drawing
  • • Group sharing circles

Family Constellations

Systemic work revealing hidden dynamics and entanglements within family systems.

  • • Orders of Love
  • • Representative perception
  • • Resolution rituals

Gestalt Techniques

Experiential chair work and dialogue to integrate split-off parts and unfinished business.

  • • Empty chair dialogue
  • • Two-chair technique
  • • Polarities integration

Clinical Hypnotherapy

Accessing subconscious material and inner child healing through guided trance states.

  • • Age regression
  • • Inner child work
  • • Resource anchoring

Biotransenergetics

Dr. Pier Luigi Lattuada's method working with archetypes and energetic patterns.

  • • Energy body activation
  • • Archetypal identification
  • • Kundalini integration

Process Oriented Therapy

Following subtle signals and body sensations to uncover unconscious process.

  • • Signal amplification
  • • Edge work
  • • Dreambody awareness

Experience These Techniques

All techniques are taught experientially in our training programs with supervised practice.
